name: Driven Brands Holdings Inc.
summary: Overview Driven Brands is the largest automotive services company in North America with a growing and highly-franchised base of approximately 5,200 locations across 49 U.S. states and 13 other countries. Our scaled, diversified platform provides high-quality services to an extensive range of retail and commercial customers.
